title: stipa pennata subvar. iberica
intro: Stipa pennata subvar. iberica, also known as the Iberian feather grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Stipa pennata subvar. iberica include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
